      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      static int TRIP_DI_AVG_ELC_CONSUMPTION_ARRAY
      Average power consumption array, one use case is to display energy consumption curve 平均电耗数组,（一个使用场景是显示能耗曲线）<br> ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_MIRROR ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE Float[] property type huaqiao.lu@ecarxgroup.com created for project hongqi at 2024-06-18 21:44:43
      static int TRIP_DI_AVG_SPEED
      Driving info: Average speed of current trip, Unit: km/h<br> 本次行程平均车速(km/h) ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_MIRROR ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE Float property type huaqiao.lu@ecarxgroup.com created for project hongqi at 2024-06-18 21:38:19
      static int TRIP_DI_TOTAL_DISTANCE
      riving info: Distance of current trip, Unit: km<br> 本次行程距离(km)<br> ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_MIRROR ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE Float property type huaqiao.lu@ecarxgroup.com created for project hongqi at 2024-06-18 21:39:16
      static int TRIP_DI_TOTAL_DURATION
      Driving info: Duration of current trip, Unit: s 本次行程时间 小计里程(trip1)：MIRROR_DRIVER_LEFT 本次里程(trip2)：MIRROR_DRIVER_RIGHT ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ_WRITE VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_MIRROR ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE Integer property type tao.zhan@ecarxgroup.com created for project hongqi at 2024-06-22 14:06:15
      static int TRIP_FUNC_AUTO_RESET_OPTION
      The setting option of Auto reset #RESET_OPTION_AUTO the special trip data with TripType<br> 自动重置Trip数据设置 ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_WRITE VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_GLOBAL ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE ITripData.AutoResetTripOption property type huaqiao.lu@ecarxgroup.com created for project hongqi at 2024-06-18 21:52:14
      static int TRIP_FUNC_RESET
      Request to reset the special trip data 重置Trip数据<br> ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_WRITE VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_GLOBAL ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE Boolean property type huaqiao.lu@ecarxgroup.com created for project hongqi at 2024-06-18 21:42:58
